heading: John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts
label: 76i John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts
notes: Amendments2012—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 112–1311997— substituted section catchline for former section catchline, designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and inserted heading, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 105–951964— substituted “John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts” for “National Cultural Center” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 88–260
amendments: Amendments2012—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 112–1311997— substituted section catchline for former section catchline, designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and inserted heading, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 105–951964— substituted “John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts” for “National Cultural Center” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 88–260

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Board shall construct for the Smithsonian Institution, with funds raised by voluntary contributions, a building to be designated as the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts on a site in the District of Columbia bounded by the Inner Loop Freeway on the east, the Theodore Roosevelt Bridge approaches on the south, Rock Creek Parkway on the west, New Hampshire Avenue and F Street on the north, which shall be selected for such purpose by the National Capital Planning Commission. The National Capital Planning Commission shall acquire by purchase, condemnation, or otherwise, lands necessary to provide for the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts and related facilities. Such building shall be in accordance with plans and specifications approved by the Commission of Fine Arts.

children.heading: Parking garage additions and site improvements
children.label: b Parking garage additions and site improvements
A
children.text: an addition to the parking garage at each of the north and south ends of the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts; and

children.heading: Availability
children.label: 2 Availability
children.text: The plan shall be on file and available for public inspection in the office of the Secretary of the Center.

children.heading: Limitation on use of appropriated funds
children.label: 3 Limitation on use of appropriated funds
A
children.text: the design and construction of an addition to the parking garage authorized under paragraph (1)(A);

children.label: B
children.text: the design and construction of site improvements and modifications authorized under paragraph (1)(B) that the Board specifically designates will be financed using sources other than appropriated funds; or

children.label: C
children.text: any project to acquire large screen format equipment for an interpretive theater, or to produce an interpretive film, that the Board specifically designates will be financed using sources other than appropriated funds.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Subject to the requirements of this subsection, the Board may undertake such activities as may be necessary to construct the expansion project.

children.heading: Responsibilities of the Board
children.label: B Responsibilities of the Board
children.text: The Board may construct the expansion project, and shall be responsible for the planning, design, engineering, and construction of the expansion project.

children.heading: Mission
children.label: i Mission
children.text: All activities carried out under this paragraph shall be within the mission of the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts to serve as the national center for the performing arts.

children.heading: Funding
children.label: ii Funding
children.text: The costs of planning, design, engineering, and construction of the expansion project shall be paid for using nonappropriated funds.

children.heading: Estimates
children.label: A Estimates
children.text: Before awarding a contract for construction of the expansion project, the Board shall estimate any additional annual operations and maintenance costs (or savings) associated with the project.

children.heading: Budget requests
children.label: B Budget requests
children.text: The Board shall account for any additional costs identified under subparagraph (A) in making a budget request for fiscal year 2014 and each fiscal year thereafter.

children.heading: Budget priorities
children.label: C Budget priorities
children.text: The Board shall base a final determination on whether to proceed with the expansion project on the ability of the Board to accommodate any additional costs identified under subparagraph (A) within the other budget priorities of the Board.

children.heading: Acknowledgments
children.label: 3 Acknowledgments
children.text: The Board may acknowledge private contributions used in carrying out the expansion project in the interior of the project, but may not acknowledge such private contributions on the exterior of the project. Any acknowledgment of private contributions under this paragraph shall be consistent with the requirements of .section 76j(b) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: will improve the existing (as of ) accessibility and education functions of the Center; andJune 8, 2012

children.label: C
children.text: will become part of the existing (as of ) structure of the Center.June 8, 2012
